title: dupatya flavidula
intro: Dupatya flavidula, also known as Indian gentian, is a plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of gentianine and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Dupatya flavidula include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
